findings_added.category: kickoff §1 SKILL-vs-AGENT pre-allocation lint missing (recurring O-P1-110 motif round 7 → round 8)
findings_added.title: Reviewer slot #46 originally pre-allocated `superpowers:verification-before-completion` SKILL not registered AGENT — Plan agent inaugural pivot required
findings_added.scope: Kickoff §1 family pre-allocation table reserved `superpowers:verification-before-completion` for batch 36 slot #46 reviewer (per round 8 protocol round 7 carry-forward). Agent dispatch at STEP 5 failed with error 'Agent type superpowers:verification-before-completion not found'. Same root-cause as round 7 O-P1-110 motif (`data:*` + `firecrawl:*` families REMOVED post round 7 codification for being SKILLS not AGENTS). Despite v1.4 codification removal of those 2 families, kickoff §1 still scheduled a SKILL — recurrence indicates registry validation gate missing from kickoff §1 generator.
findings_added.rule_violation: Kickoff §1 family pre-allocation MUST validate each subagent_type candidate against registered AGENT roster (Task tool's `subagent_type` enum) at pre-allocation time. v1.4 N? candidate (post round 7 O-P1-110 codification appears incomplete — explicit lint missing).
findings_added.repair_action: Pivoted to Plan agent inaugural burn (Plan family unburned in P1 cumulative); Plan returned CONDITIONAL_PASS 95.0% accuracy. Kickoff §1 dispatch failed gracefully (no halt required, single round-trip cost). Plan agent toolset adaptation: Write-tool-less inline markdown output + main-session write substitution.
findings_added.v1_5_codification_candidate: v1.5 NEW codification — kickoff §1 lint: pre-flight check at kickoff §1 generation time validates each `Rule D slot N+1 reserved` candidate against actual agent registry before kickoff is committed. HALT-on-mismatch with explicit list of registered AGENTS. Implementation: kickoff §1 generator script that calls `Task` tool's agent registry list + filters out SKILLS (loaded via `Skill` tool only). Failure mode pattern signature: `Agent type 'X' not found. Available agents: ...` error → registry mismatch.
findings_added.round_8_motif: Round 8 NEW motif: kickoff pre-allocation lint regression. Joins round 7 O-P1-110 (data + firecrawl families removed) as recurring SKILL-vs-AGENT confusion at kickoff-generator level. v1.5 codification mandatory before round 9+ batches.

findings_added.category: writer-family parent_section table_caption regression — .xpt textual heading used as parent_section
findings_added.title: 27 atoms in 36b post-Option-H use .xpt file caption as parent_section instead of canonical section ancestor (8 tu.xpt + 8 tr.xpt + 6 relrec.xpt + 5 vs.xpt) — flagged AMBIGUOUS by reviewer slot #46 atom 6
findings_added.scope: Reviewer slot #46 Plan flagged atom 6 (ig34_p0356_a005, relrec.xpt TABLE_HEADER) parent_section='relrec.xpt' as AMBIGUOUS-lean-OVERRIDE. Main-session structural sweep extended scope: 27 cumulative .xpt-as-parent_section atoms in 36b post-Option-H (8 tu.xpt + 8 tr.xpt + 6 relrec.xpt + 5 vs.xpt). Both writer original AND executor repair used .xpt textual heading as parent_section for child rows of those L6 .xpt HEADINGs. Per N7 v1.4 'L6 textual heading canonical full-form' rule, the L6 .xpt textual heading IS used as parent_section consistently — but the reviewer questioned whether `relrec.xpt` (file caption) qualifies as 'textual heading canonical full-form' or whether parent_section should resolve up to §6.3.12.3 (or to a more descriptive form like 'TU – Example 3 Dataset').
findings_added.atom_id_anchor: ig34_p0356_a005 (sample anchor) + 26 other .xpt-parent atoms in 36b post-Option-H (atoms with parent ∈ {tu.xpt, tr.xpt, relrec.xpt, vs.xpt})
findings_added.rule_violation: AMBIGUOUS — both readings defensible. (a) Strict N7 v1.4 reading: L6 textual heading canonical full-form is whatever PDF emits (here `tu.xpt` / `tr.xpt` etc are PDF visual labels for those Example dataset tables). (b) Discipline-extension reading: parent_section should be a SECTION DESCRIPTOR not a FILE CAPTION; resolve to §6.3.12.3 (numbered ancestor) or 'TU – Example 3 Dataset' (descriptive form). Reviewer Plan favored (b) discipline-extension reading per architectural-overview posture.
findings_added.repair_action: DEFERRED to v1.5 cut OR reconciler-side decision — reviewer flagged AMBIGUOUS not FAIL; 27 atoms scope warrants v1.5 codification before mass-rewrite. Joins round 7 O-P1-114 (L7 Example parent canonical-form) + round 8 batch 36 O-P1-122 = 2 cumulative parent_section discipline regression motifs deferred to v1.5 cut session.
findings_added.v1_5_codification_candidate: v1.5 NEW codification — extend N7 / NEW6 parent_section rule: (a) explicit 'table_caption is NEVER a parent_section' sub-clause OR (b) formal recognition of L6 .xpt textual-heading-as-parent convention (codify either way for consistency). Rule A pre-check: if parent_section value matches `^[a-z]+\.xpt$` or similar caption pattern, flag as discipline regression OR explicit OK per (b). Recommend collecting cumulative scope across rounds 5-7+8 .xpt-as-parent occurrences before bulk fix.
findings_added.writer_family_motif: NEW round-8 motif: writer-family parent_section table_caption regression. Distinct from round 5 O-P1-91 bare 'Example N' shortcut + round 7 O-P1-113 L2 short-bracket parent-skip + round 7 O-P1-114 L7 Example L5-numbered-vs-L6-textual canonical form. Joins parent_section discipline family motif as 4th distinct sub-pattern. Severity MEDIUM because (a) reviewer flagged AMBIGUOUS not FAIL; (b) Option H auto-fix is straightforward once v1.5 codifies preferred form; (c) deferred per project policy — non-blocking for batch 36 closure.
